metrics.note: ANALYTICAL 3D-unproject/reproject fork of the KEYSTONE compound end-to-end render stack on ANIMATED 'classroom' (1920x1080, 8 frames, keyframe_every=2, bounces=12). Camera DOLLIED+PANNED+YAWED (cam_motion=1.0) for real parallax + silhouette disocclusion. REFERENCE = every frame FULLY at 4096 spp, adaptive OFF, denoise OFF (true frames); T_ref = summed whole-subprocess wall-clock. OURS = keyframes rendered with the FULL anchor stack [adaptive (thr=0.02, min=16) + oidn denoiser + albedo/normal prefiltered guides + light-tree, draft_spp=512] at full whole-subprocess wall-clock; non-key frames reprojected by an ANALYTICAL 3D unproject/reproject that uses the KNOWN camera world matrices (reconstructed in numpy from the exact keyframe formula + the CX_CAM_BASE/CX_CAM_INTRINSICS sidecars) plus the target frame's OWN Z/depth pass — it NEVER touches the Cycles Vector (motion) pass. Per target pixel: unproject via depth to the target camera's 3D space, transform to world via M_target, reproject into the keyframe camera via inv(M_key)+shared intrinsics -> (sx,sy); the SAME backward bilinear gather core then samples the keyframe color. Disocclusion = a DEPTH-CONSISTENCY test (out-of-bounds | behind-camera | target-no-surface | key depth at (sx,sy) inconsistent with the reprojected point's key-view depth beyond disocclusion_thresh=0.1 relative), dilated; patched by hole_fill=rerender. depth_convention='auto' -> chosen 'planar' by truth-free median-residual self-calibration (planar_resid=0.005901, distance_resid=0.008936). IDENTITY PROBE (reproject frame 0 onto its OWN camera) max_error=6.0028372820143364e-12 px validated the projection signs + 4x4 inverse BEFORE any cross-frame trust. Derived pinhole fx=1500.000 fy=1500.000 cx=960.000 cy=540.000; view_frame cross-check max_rel_err=0.0. net_speedup = T_ref / T_stack = ONE measured wall-clock ratio on the SAME box (NOT a product of per-stage speedups). quality = end-to-end SSIM of DELIVERED vs TRUE frames (GLOBAL + per-8x8-tile worst/p5, tonemapped) — real scikit-image on real pixels, measurement-only. The analytic warp+mask are real numpy on real pixels (NOT modeled). reproject_method=analytical-3d-unproject. ONE MODELED STEP (unchanged from the keystone): the disocclusion crop re-render is charged as fixed_overhead + disocc_frac*keyframe_pixel_trace, fixed_overhead=3.347s (MEASURED Blender start+load+BVH a real crop pays in FULL) — honest and CONSERVATIVE. Because that crop-trace time is DERIVED it is the ONLY non-directly-measured number, so modeled=true. Patch pixels are the ANCHOR-QUALITY render of that frame (NOT the reference), so delivered-frame SSIM stays honest. analytic camera pose diverged from Blender's rendered matrix_world (max |Δ|=0.359 > 0.001); the camera is parented/constrained or non-XYZ — SWITCHED to the emitted per-frame matrix_world (exactly what Cycles rendered).

OURS = keyframes rendered with the FULL anchor stack [adaptive (thr=0.02, min=16) + oidn denoiser + albedo/normal prefiltered guides + light-tree, draft_spp=256] at full whole-subprocess wall-clock; non-key frames reprojected by an ANALYTICAL 3D unproject/reproject that uses the KNOWN camera world matrices (reconstructed in numpy from the exact keyframe formula + the CX_CAM_BASE/CX_CAM_INTRINSICS sidecars) plus the target frame's OWN Z/depth pass — it NEVER touches the Cycles Vector (motion) pass. Per target pixel: unproject via depth to the target camera's 3D space, transform to world via M_target, reproject into the keyframe camera via inv(M_key)+shared intrinsics -> (sx,sy); the SAME backward bilinear gather core then samples the keyframe color. Disocclusion = a DEPTH-CONSISTENCY test (out-of-bounds | behind-camera | target-no-surface | key depth at (sx,sy) inconsistent with the reprojected point's key-view depth beyond disocclusion_thresh=0.1 relative), dilated; patched by hole_fill=rerender. depth_convention='auto' -> chosen 'planar' by truth-free median-residual self-calibration (planar_resid=0.005899, distance_resid=0.008932). IDENTITY PROBE (reproject frame 0 onto its OWN camera) max_error=6.0028372820143364e-12 px validated the projection signs + 4x4 inverse BEFORE any cross-frame trust. Derived pinhole fx=1500.000 fy=1500.000 cx=960.000 cy=540.000; view_frame cross-check max_rel_err=0.0. net_speedup = T_ref / T_stack = ONE measured wall-clock ratio on the SAME box (NOT a product of per-stage speedups). quality = end-to-end SSIM of DELIVERED vs TRUE frames (GLOBAL + per-8x8-tile worst/p5, tonemapped) — real scikit-image on real pixels, measurement-only. The analytic warp+mask are real numpy on real pixels (NOT modeled). reproject_method=analytical-3d-unproject. ONE MODELED STEP (unchanged from the keystone): the disocclusion crop re-render is charged as fixed_overhead + disocc_frac*keyframe_pixel_trace, fixed_overhead=2.572s (MEASURED Blender start+load+BVH a real crop pays in FULL) — honest and CONSERVATIVE. Because that crop-trace time is DERIVED it is the ONLY non-directly-measured number, so modeled=true. Patch pixels are the ANCHOR-QUALITY render of that frame (NOT the reference), so delivered-frame SSIM stays honest. analytic camera pose diverged from Blender's rendered matrix_world (max |Δ|=0.359 > 0.001); the camera is parented/constrained or non-XYZ — SWITCHED to the emitted per-frame matrix_world (exactly what Cycles rendered).

Disocclusion = a DEPTH-CONSISTENCY test (out-of-bounds | behind-camera | target-no-surface | key depth at (sx,sy) inconsistent with the reprojected point's key-view depth beyond disocclusion_thresh=0.1 relative), dilated; patched by hole_fill=nearest. depth_convention='auto' -> chosen 'planar' by truth-free median-residual self-calibration (planar_resid=0.005901, distance_resid=0.008936). IDENTITY PROBE (reproject frame 0 onto its OWN camera) max_error=6.0028372820143364e-12 px validated the projection signs + 4x4 inverse BEFORE any cross-frame trust. Derived pinhole fx=1500.000 fy=1500.000 cx=960.000 cy=540.000; view_frame cross-check max_rel_err=0.0. net_speedup = T_ref / T_stack = ONE measured wall-clock ratio on the SAME box (NOT a product of per-stage speedups). quality = end-to-end SSIM of DELIVERED vs TRUE frames (GLOBAL + per-8x8-tile worst/p5, tonemapped) — real scikit-image on real pixels, measurement-only. The analytic warp+mask are real numpy on real pixels (NOT modeled). reproject_method=analytical-3d-unproject. hole_fill=nearest: disocclusions filled by real numpy at 0 render cost (charged); NO modeled step, modeled=false. analytic camera pose diverged from Blender's rendered matrix_world (max |Δ|=0.359 > 0.001); the camera is parented/constrained or non-XYZ — SWITCHED to the emitted per-frame matrix_world (exactly what Cycles rendered).
